review_text: Had a night in the park - it is a perfect location. Right on the banks of the Snowy River. Staff friendly on arrival and amenities are very clean. Great little park. Great Dalgety Pub over the road. What more could anyone want?

We had our own camping accommodation so can't speak to the cabins.  Service helpful and friendly and park well situated across the road from Buckleys Hotel where the food was great. Not just your average pub fare.
Enjoyed our overnight stay and will return.
Great service but overpriced for camping with no electricity.Also hot water in showers was not working properly

Camped in our van
Super clean , great amenities, pub for dinner was great
All That we have come to delight in with our smaller towns, well done team
Mathew and claire april 26

My son loved the cabin style as soon as we opened it during the late night arrival.

He loved backside facing river, just beautiful.

Facility was perfect.

He liked shower facility in particular.

Overall, we all there enjoyed a quick stay including looking around people enjoying camping, caravan etc etc.

Sorry missed taking photos.
Flat lovely grassed caravan park with reasonable sites and new clean amenities
Not really caravan people but this was definitely one of the best we have stayed in. Great amenities, good location and Ruth was very helpful.

Great park with easy access to the river. The park does not have a drop point, but the amenities are clean and in good condition. Some of the sites need hose/power extensions to make the distance, so it’s worth having some spare connectors in case you can’t get another site.

Best place to stay in Berridale.
Great staff, perfect location, spotless cabins.
Quiet and relaxing off peak. Great for people on a lazy trip around the region, travelling workers, or just a spontaneous trip down from Canberra

A beautiful caravan park overlooking the Snowy River. Best views from the unpowered area of the river and historic bridge. The facilities are impeccably maintained and Natalie was so accommodating in all respects. Thank you.
The pub just across the road is fabulous with great food and service and a wonderful part of the area’s history.

We love staying at the Snowy River Holiday Park. Our most recent stay was an overnight one in our motorhome on an unpowered site. There was plenty of room and the ground was nice and level where we were. The river is just a stones throw away and provided a lovely place to cool down on a hot day for us and our dog. The pub is just across the road (also dog friendly on the verandah). We’ll be back to both again I’m sure!

We booked a caravan site here for one night and ended up staying two, we were greeted by a happy, helpful lady. Park was situated right on the snowy river with a lovely walk and an easy accessible place to swim. Amenities were lovely and clean, also with a great camp kitchen everything you would need.
Would definitely return next time we're in the area.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay in our caravan at this beautiful clean and manicured park. The staff were all very helpful and pleasant. There is easy access to the Snowy River which was a bonus for our JR as he loves to swim, also enjoyed the walk along the river.   Across the road in easy walking distance  is the Buckley's Crossing pub with above average pub meals and friendly staff and  locals.
We would definitely stop here again and highly recommend to anyone heading to this area.

Fabulous caravan park, lovely grass sites, spacious, plenty of parking. Amenities are spotless, with little special touches like sunscreen, and washing machines so reasonably priced.
Great location, with pub across the road, and a coffee van. Not far from Jindabyne, Cooma, Berridale and Adaminby

We had 2 nights in our caravan at Snowy River Holiday Park and it wasn't long enough. Staff are very friendly and amenities very clean. The holiday park is  located right next to the river with a picturesque and peaceful walk along its bank  and if you are lucky you may see a platypus. Dalgety has history and a walk around the township is worthwhile and make sure you visit the Hotel for lunch or dinner. The holiday Park is also a good location for day trips to other areas of the Snowies.
Great park been before this time in our van clean and tidy, great time swimming had the best weather
Great spot right on the river. Staff are great.
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay - quiet , good facilities and a great place to swim. Natalie was very friendly and helpful- thank you.

I stayed in my own van so can't comment on the rooms etc.  The facilities provided were of high quality and clean and tidy. Staff were very helpful and friendly and pricing was very reasonable   I will now seek out places within this group of parks.
Very well kept campsite next to Snowy River 30 minutes from Jindabyne. Lovely setting and everything in great shape. Very peaceful. Recommended.
Awesome spot and great customer service. However there was no air con in the cabins.

Love the van park been going there for 5 years same time every year. It has changed hands several times but we have never paid more than $45 a night. The price hike to $65 will make us and our friends rethink our holiday next year. Considering it is very remote and doesn't have a dump point. The only place for food is the pub and only open from Wednesday to Sunday.

Snowy River Holiday Park is an absolute gem and the best place we stayed on our recent summer roadtrip.

The proximity to the iconic Snowy River is the standout – nice and calm, and perfect for swimming, floating, and cooling off on hot days. We spent hours in and around the water, and it felt incredibly safe and accessible for all ages. Having direct access to the Snowy River makes this park truly special.

The park itself has fantastic green space with plenty of open, grassy areas for kids to run around, ride bikes, kick a ball, or just relax under the trees. The family-friendly atmosphere really stood out.

Facilities are excellent. Amenities are clean and well maintained, the camp kitchen is well equipped, and everything feels thoughtfully laid out and easy to use. It’s clear the park is well managed and cared for.

The location is another huge plus. You’re right on the doorstep of Kosciuszko National Park, with easy access to alpine walking tracks, stunning scenery, and outdoor adventures. Jindabyne is also close by, making it easy to enjoy cafés, shops, lake activities, and local tourist highlights without sacrificing the peaceful riverside setting.

As a summer base for swimming, exploring the national park, and enjoying the alpine region, it’s hard to beat. We left feeling relaxed and refreshed and are already planning a return visit. Highly recommend Snowy River Holiday Park to anyone looking for a high-quality, well-located holiday spot.

It' s a very isolated town and a very peaceful caravan park on the Snowy River. It is within driving distance to sightseeing opportunities, whilst avoiding all the hustle and bustle.
The cabins are very private, peaceful, and you can bring your pet in!
My family & friends chose to have my sisters 70th birthday here & it was absolutely fantastic. The staff were very lovely. We will definitely be going back there, I recommend it highly
A wonderful peaceful place that stay !
Lovely spot for a few days relaxing by the river.

We arrived for 3 nights and ended up extending our stay for an extra night because it was simply hard to leave this lovely campsite.
The peaceful riverside setting, open green lawns and children happily playing in the river create a truly special atmosphere.
Just across from the campground there is a charming local pub with a cheerful atmosphere and tasty food, which added even more to the experience.
The host is wonderful – warm, smiling, and constantly walking around the campground to make sure everything is just right.
If we hadn’t been limited by time, we would have happily stayed for a full week.
Great facilities very helpful and friendly. Will return whenever possible.

I stayed a night at an unpowered site and loved it. Loved being able to have a hot shower, too 😂
Got there after dark, so had no idea how beautiful the area was until the next morning. Toddler, dog & myself went for a beautiful morning walk before breakfast down by the river, and then again after our shower. Down by Snowy River, there's a rope swing (that I had a great time swinging on 😂 wouldn't go in the water, though, I'm too scared 🤣🤣 but swimmers said the water was lovely 🤭).
Can't wait to pass through Dalgety again just to stay here again. 😍
The staff were friendly as ever and super accommodating. I loved every moment of my brief stay! 🙌🏻

We camped in the unpowered site, with lush grass, shady trees, great facilities. With a swim in the Snowy River right there!!
This campground is simply beautiful.
A must stay if you are in the area.
Excellent camping ground. Very spacious and green. Close to the river for swimming and canoeing. Very good amenities and very well maintained. For a relaxing time this is the place.

We had a fantastic stay with our motorhome.
Perfectly clean toilet/shower.
Location is amazing.

For us it was a combination of things that made this a great place to stay.   Very friendly greeting on arrival from Robyn.   Nice grass shady spot.  Snowy River Sound of a night.  Buckleys Crossing Hotel within walking distance.   Very clean and modern amenities.  Plus it was so peaceful.  Damn we miss it already.

What a little gem of a place! If you are in the area I highly recommend a stop over, the park is lovely, well kept with wonderful staff, beautiful little river frontage and pub across the road with great meals

After a long 8 hour journey to the little town of Dalgety my family and I were met on arrival with the peace and tranquillity that the snowy river holiday park provides.
The parks grounds a well kept with beautiful gardens and manicured lawns that roll down the river bank to meet the clear and peaceful snowy river.
The cabins are very clean and tidy. With all of the nessities provided as well as an abundance of hot water to warm up after long days swimming, kayaking, gold prospecting and bird watching around the river.
We loved that our four legged family members could join us for our trip which made it that much more enjoyable.
The amenities and wash room were very easy to navigate, very modern and there seemed to always be somewhere there cleaning them and tiding up after their guests.
The team members and owners could not be more friendly or accommodating to our needs. We will definitely be returning to this park and telling all of our friends and relatives! Worth the drive!
P.s the local winery has amazing local drinks and food!

You won't be disappointed. Excellent peaceful location with a great river to swim in.... Safe for kids in the shallow sandy rock pools. Plenty of entertainment. The amenities block is also very good and updated to a modern standard and clean.

Had a great new year break here. The powered sites are large with plenty of small trees between sites. There is very little road noise and the river is a great place to cool off. We enjoyed ourselves so much we stayed an extra night.

8mt Motorhome, power and water.
Toilets clean. River great for swimming, floats, etc.
Great spot on the Snowy River - well maintained caravan park, great amenities - clean and recently renovated it seems.  Friendly staff - will come back and stay again!

An excellent place to simply chill out.
Cabins are clean, well appointed (a tad rustic) but good fun. The location is superb and the Staff were very friendly and efficient
Overall, a great place.

Need a Lay Over ?? ... STOP right here !! Wonderful Friendly Staff, Easy Access & Great Amenities !!
HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
Always come back twice  a year to compete in competitions and always stay in my van here. Bathrooms are always clean and the property well maintained. Close to the pub for meals.

I came here based on a recommendation by some people I met on my travels. Highlights were being able to have a sauna (extra cost and booking - "snowy river sauna") and dip in the snowy river. Also able to have some adventures paddling on the river above and below the weir.
Facilities at the campground were clean and well equipped. I slept very well in my tent near the bridge, the sound of the rushing weir lulling me to sleep.
I'll be recommending this place to anyone who asks.

We had a great weekend stay at The Snowy River Caravan Park. Beautiful grassy, shady powered site. Very reasonably priced. Immaculate amenities. Very friendly and helpful owners made great suggestions for local attractions. We especially enjoyed the Dalgety Winery and Microsoft Brewery for lunch. An awesome suggestion. Thanks Robyn for a great stay!
Great place for star gazing. Low light pollution,clear skies & SHORT WALK TO THE PUB 👍

Here's a review based on your feedback:

"We recently had the pleasure of staying at Snowy River Caravan Park under the wonderful new ownership of Robyn and Chris. This beautiful park is the perfect spot to unwind, rest, and relax, surrounded by stunning scenery. The short drive to Jindabyne makes it an ideal base for enjoying the snow and hitting the slopes. The park is exceptionally clean and tidy, reflecting the high standards of the new owners. We highly recommend Snowy River Caravan Park to anyone looking for a peaceful and rejuvenating getaway. Thanks, Robyn and Chris, for making our stay so enjoyable!"

What a magic place, totally unexpected. We booked a cabin, great facilities, very clean and tidy. Yes they are older style, but so are we. We loved it so much we extended our stay.  Lloyd was a wealth of knowledge about his surrounding areas and the town of Dalgety and beyond. We will definitely be back.  👍
Very nice cosy accommodation
Stayed here in my Van with my Dog , good clean park right on the Snowy River, and if you are lucky you will be checked in by Loyd who is a great bloke with a wealth of local knowledge
Snowy River Holiday Park exceeded all our expectations! Our 3-day stay was nothing short of amazing. Highly recommend this fantastic destination.

Quiet campground perfect for snow trip. Campground is located 45 minutes from the SkiTube and is great value for money. Snowy River Sauna Dalgety operating on site as a separate business - great way to relax after a day on the slopes.

**⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Amazing Stay – Highly Recommend!**

We recently stayed at the snowy river caravan park  and had a fantastic time! The park was clean, well-maintained, and had great facilities, including dry room for the kids after the snow session,  clean showers, and shared kitchen

The staff were friendly and helpful, making us feel welcome from the moment we arrived. Our caravan site was spacious and had everything we needed for a comfortable stay. The location was perfect, with the river walk, nearby attractions, or scenic views

We especially loved  the camp kitchen, clean amenities and a very good host. It’s clear that the management takes pride in providing a great experience for guests.

We’ll definitely be back and would highly recommend this park to anyone looking for a relaxing and enjoyable getaway

We just stayed for easter long weekend. Must say amazing location, close to so many attractions and plenty to see. Lloyd was a legend, top bloke to deal with... very welcoming and a humble bloke. Very warm welcome and surely will be back in the future.

The park grounds and cabins are freshly maintained. Lloyd, the host, is very knowledgeable of the area and is very helpful. My wife and I had a great experience and I recommend staying at the Snowy River Holiday Park.

What a lovely peaceful location, I couldn’t fault the setting on the Snowy River in Dalgety. We prefer quiet locations and this was 100% on the mark. If you’re looking for an escape from the city noise, wholesome family friendly atmosphere and traditional holiday, this is it.
The cabins are older but clean, well equipped and heated. The grounds are well kept and our two toddlers were perfectly safe walking and riding bikes around the park.
The facilities are fanatic! Lloyd is a very kind and hospitable man 🙌 we really enjoyed our time in Dalguety
Lovely unpowered site. Amenities were clean & water hot. Lovely to walk down to Snowy River.

We had a great stay at this caravan park. The kitchen was well-equipped, the bathrooms were always clean, and the customer service was outstanding. We arrived late, but they still welcomed us warmly.
Huge thanks to Lloyd for the excellent hospitality! Highly recommend this place.
Marco
Quaint

It’s an old school holiday park, but it’s clean and well run. It’s on the banks of the snowy river with good swimming under the bridge. There’s an excellent pub across the road. All up a great spot to spend a weekend.
Very nice holiday park
Great little country caravan park on the river

Back for another end of year/beginning of the new year family trip and our whole family is so so happy. The river is wonderful giving the best scenery for relaxation and to clear the mind of all that stress that builds up. The cabins are ad cosy as we remember, the DVD choices always thrill the kids, and Lloyd is always so happy and welcoming. Happy to be back and already talking about the next one. |It's becoming our tradition.

This campground is lovely. We were situated on the west side of the campground away from the cabins. We had a lot of room and had shade from under a tree. On the side of camp ground we were on we were close to the public toilets which were clean and tidy and there was a light on in them all night. The showers and toilets at the campsite were tidy. There was an indoor camp kitchen on our side of the camp and that was clean and tidy.  In front of the camp ground is the snowy river which is great to swim in during summer. It was a 2 min walk from our camp site. The man who works at reception is really helpful and kind.
Lovely owner. Very clean and WARM shower block. Excellent.

This is not in the middle of town, but it has all the amenities you need - perfectly clean bathrooms, massive sites, fire pits permitted - located on the banks of the Snowy, a playground just "there" and Buckleys Crossing pub, a three minute walk away. The thing that topped it off? Lloyd - the manager/owner. Friendly, amenable and a wealth of information.

Please, please. Stay here. Powered or uncovered. Cabins. All accommodation types accounted for. It was perfect

Theis place is Central to visit Jindabyne Adaminaby. Cooma Bredbo Christmas Shack. But it's also looking at the Snowy River after the dam. Look at the history. This place should have the train from Brisbane to Melbourne ....
Clean and heated bathroom & camp kitchen. Lloyd is very knowledgable and helpful, the price is also very reasonable, love it☺️

Cozy, comfortable, clean cabin made for a great stay for our group of six. Great location less than an hour's drive from the ski fields, on the banks of the Snowy River. Very reasonable prices. Our host, Lloyd, was friendly and welcoming and a wealth of knowledge on the local area. Thanks for a great stay
Great spot on the banks of the mighty snowy river 👍🏻

Wonderfully clean cabin with excellent heating and good WiFi. The hosts were very friendly and helpful and the pub was a short walk away across the road. Short walk to the Snowy River which friends say they swim in in Summer. Fairly good road to Jindabyne from here too.

Lloyd, you & your small team should be very proud of what you deliver.
Amenities are clean & the grounds are immaculate.
You can see the pride you put into your park & the locals we spoke to hold you in high regard.
Keep up the great work
Hope to pass by again soon

Thank you so much Lloyd for a wonderful stay in your beautiful caravan park, on our arrival you demonstrated how professional you are in running a business we could see in your eyes just how hard you work you put all your effort in to that park, please pass on to the cleaner what a wonderful job he/she does so clean, allowing us to have a camp fire just topped it off for us, your knowledge of the area was outstanding, I will absolutely recommend your park to everyone heading your way, once a gain thank you
Great little park and great staff. Very friendly village atmosphere and good fishing. Definitely on the return list!

The greenest grass I've seen in such a long time!  Lloyd is lovely and full of knowledge of the local area. Quiet caravan park, super clean amenities, grounds are beautiful, and right on the Snowy River, just perfect!

Great park, lovely green grass on 26/1/24.
Fire is possible. Old, but very clean & spacious cabins

We have been coming here at the Snowy River Holiday Park for the past 7 years.|This place by far has to be one of the best holiday parks in the country.|The park is well maintained and facilities kept spick and span.|This park is like a magnet it just keeps on getting you to come here.|The town of Dalgety is also lovely and typical of a country town full of character.|See you next year and the year after and after.

A hidden gem 🤩 A fantastic and well equipped caravan park with clean and functioning amenities, The staff are absolutely delightful as well as the owner.

Dog 🐶 friendly, so we were able to bring our fur baby along with us on our holiday.

Enjoyed walking around Dalgety right near snowy river, and under 30 minutes to Jindabyne.

There are some great attractions nearby, including wineries and local microbreweries.

I’ll definitely be staying again 👍

Beautiful 5 night stay! Lloyd was so helpful and knowledgable,
Gardens and very clean modern facilities.
If you’re looking for a great family place great cabins bbq area and river this is the spot. Great prices also
Had a meal at the pub. Sevice from the bar staff great. The meal was ok. Nice surroundings. Not worth travelling out of your way to visit.

The perfect place to just take in this beautiful country with the Great Snowy River ambling by.  It’s quite clean and Loyd the owner ever helpful. The pub across the road, not open Monday, Tuesday, is a cracking place for a bevy and a feed.  Well done Loyd that was a great stay, on leaving you said I’ll see  you next time, that is a definite, to visit only once would be a travisty.
Great park. Well maintained and really pretty place. Great kick off for day trips. Highly recommend.

We (eight familes of 29 members) did camping at this holiday park and recommend whoever interested. They got cabins too. Very clean amenities and super friendly customer service. Whole camp ground is green and well maintained. We were able to experience flash flooding of Snowy River which is very rare.

Good sized caravan park with powered and unpowered sites and many cabins, which can sleep 4. The owner Lloyd is great and very helpful. We camped here a few years ago and the old owners were not nice. The snowy river flows through on one side of the park and is great for swimming and kayaking in. Lovely temperature in summer. The cabin didn’t have air con but it kept cool as it was in the shade constantly, being under the large poplar trees. Lovely tiny town to wander around. There’s also a great little playground across the road for young kids. Pub is good too, and there’s a coffee van across the road which opens early in the morning. There’s a microbrewery 15 mins away which was great. Will be back 😊

I recently stayed at Snowy River Holiday Park, and it exceeded all my expectations. Nestled by the tranquil Snowy River, the surroundings were a picturesque blend of green pastures. The serenity of the location made for a truly peaceful and calm retreat. The amenities were top-notch, and the staff was exceptionally friendly. If you're seeking a quiet getaway surrounded by nature's beauty, this is the perfect spot. Five stars all the way!

Jan 2024.
I'd forgotten to post a review for here.
We really enjoyed our stay here back in Dec 2023.
Amenities good.
Camp kitchen good.
Dog friendly.
Lloyd & Staff very friendly and helpful.
Definitely be back one day.

Short walk to pub for a good meal.

Hope Izzy found a forever home.

Has got all requirements to fulfill what a campsite could offer!  Fantastic location and tranquil nature! The cabins and camping area have well-maintained amenities.  Staff are prompt and very helpful from the first point of contact to check out! Being a well experienced and a seasoned traveler, I can recommend it to all! Individuals to families! A Big shout to the man in charge Lloyd! Keep up the good work! John

It was an excellent experience for our group of 29. Despite the heavy rain on Christmas day onwards we had a quality time together ❤️. Lloyd and the crew keep this place nice and supper clean. They all are very friendly and supportive make us feel welcomed. Well equipped kitchen and clean hot shower were great addition for campers using non powered sites. Thanks Snowy river camping park for making our Christmas holidays memorable. 😍
Thanks for making our stay in Dalgety memorable. The park is beautiful. Spotlessly clean and tidy. Highlight I saw a platypus!
Ā quiet small town park in a very nice seeing, You can get a lovely powered site. The Snowy River is right next door. Manager and staff are great. Coffee cart and hotel across the road,

If you are wanting to stay somewhere that is so beautiful on the Snowy River and so quiet where People are so friendly, book in for a stay and the Manager Lloyd is very helpful and the park amenities are beautifully clean.
Lloyd is so caring that he takes time to ask what you like to do like, skiing, mountain bike riding, fishing  or just staying in a beautiful quiet place to relax.
Lloyd is so helpful and makes time to tell you about the town and any other advice.

The amenities and park are spotless and if you are a skier he even has a drying room for your wet clothing after skiing.
It is only a short 50 minute drive to any of the snowfields and there is also the amazing Pub Buckleys across the road for beautiful meals.
I love staying at Snowy River Park and will definitely be back again.
Fantastic park

My new favorite campground ! We arrived wet and bedraggled after camping the previous night in the national park in a storm. This was like paradise ! Lloyd really looked after us and the place has such a good vibe. Also achieved a life long goal of seeing a platypus. Aside from the beautiful natural setting it's the little attention to details that make this a great campground,  all a campers needs have been anticipated.  Definitely coming back.
Hidden gem of a caravan park and our family favourite we keep coming back to year after year. Stunning scenery with the most beautiful river with platypus. Exceptional hosts and very clean amenities.
Absolutely STUNNING caravan park! Lovely and quiet and the river is just beautiful. Very lovely hosts too and exceptionally clean amenities.
Nice people. Beautiful park close to Snowy River.
